title: Implement per-gun state sync via GunSyncS2CPacket (packet extension + client handling)

reference_files.reason: Persistence + sync table - per-gun sync via GunSyncS2CPacket carrying state mapping, reuses gun data sync channel
GunSyncS2CPacket specification - trigger timing, content (installedPlugins + modifierVersion + state mapping), client usage
Data packet design table - GunSyncS2CPacket content and trigger timing

acceptance_criteria: GunSyncS2CPacket extended to include per-gun state mapping (Map<ResourceLocation, Object>) in addition to existing installedPlugins + modifierVersion
Packet Codec serializes state map using StateValueCodecs dispatch for mixed value types
Packet only includes state keys that have been written (non-default), not all registered states
Client-side handler updates GunData.state on the client ItemStack from received packet
Existing trigger timings preserved (switch main hand, install/uninstall plugin, join world) and now also carry state
Packet name reflects GunSyncS2CPacket semantics (renamed from PluginSyncS2CPacket if not already done in M4)
deliverables: src/main/java/org/yanbwe/modularshoot/network/GunSyncS2CPacket.java (updated: add state mapping field + Codec + client handler)
